name: The Dim Accord
specialty: Specializing in covert operations and infiltration, their technical prowess lies in their ability to blend seamlessly into the Undercity's shadows, often gaining access to restricted areas others cannot.

members.name: Zinnia Drakon
members.note: A scarred former Wardens of Ash enforcer who switched sides after losing her family in a raid gone wrong.

members.name: Vexil Ironhide
members.note: A gruff and battle-hardened warrior, his arm replaced with a mechanical one after a fateful encounter with a rift monster.

members.name: Eirwyn Nightshadow
members.note: A quiet and enigmatic sorcerer who hides his true power beneath a veil of humility.

members.name: Rilnar Swiftfoot
members.note: A lithe and agile combatant, he's the only member of the group with a visible marking: a tattoo of a cat's paw on his cheek.

visual: Clad in dark, form-fitting attire that blends with the Undercity's grime, they move with a coordinated silence and purpose, their only identifying mark being a small obsidian lotus emblem subtly woven into their clothing.
reputation_note: Whispers echo of a crew that's feared for their stealth and ruthless efficiency, yet whispered about for their mysterious connections to the Obsidian Lotus.
history: [2026-03-14] Completed a epic-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+3/5)
